title: Izzat Ki Roti
subTitle: Laxmi lives happily with her sons Krishna and Jeet. However, jealous Veerendra Pratap tries to steal her business by turning the brothers against each other.

title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
subTitle: Raj, an aspiring singer, rescues Pooja, the daughter of a wealthy man, from an accident. However, he soon finds himself in a web of complications when he falls in love with her best friend.

title: Tathastu
subTitle: A factory worker's son needs a heart transplant but the hospital will not go ahead with it without paying upfront. So, he is forced to take the law into his own hands to save his sick child.

title: Corporate
subTitle: An ambitious career woman unknowingly becomes a pawn in a corporate war between two rival companies and gets caught in a web that shatters her professional and personal life.

title: Jeevan Ek Sanghursh
subTitle: Karan, a good-hearted thief, is compelled to work for a criminal mastermind. However, things take a turn when he reunites with his estranged family and tries to leave the underworld.

title: Naajayaz
subTitle: Jai and Sandhya pursue gangster Raj Solanki, but the case takes a shocking twist when Jai discovers Raj is his long-lost father.

title: Parampara
subTitle: Pratap and Ranvir want to settle their family fight by risking their friendship in a dangerous duel. Eventually, they reunite and embrace each other as brothers for the first time.

title: Pyar Ke Naam Qurbaan
subTitle: Billu attempts to play Holi with Devika, but she gets him arrested. In an attempt to take revenge, he kidnaps her, which infuriates her brother, who sets out to save her.

title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahin
subTitle: When Pooja flees from home to reunite with her boyfriend, she meets Raghu, who agrees to escort her. As they travel together, she subsequently catches feelings for him.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Raaz
subTitle: Sanjana and Aditya go to Ooty for a holiday to save their unsteady marriage. However, she is haunted by a spirit who reveals some dark secrets about her husband and his past.

title: Sheshnaag
subTitle: Pritam and Banu, two shape-shifting snakes in human form, seek protection from a young man when an evil priest tries to hunt them down and use them in a ritual for wealth and immortality.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Take 2 Extraaa
subTitle: Discover the behind-the-scenes world of popular films, with the cast and crew revealing their unique experiences and interesting stories from the set.

title: Main Aisa Hi Hoon
subTitle: Indraneel, an autistic single father, lives with his daughter, Gungun. When Gungun's grandfather comes to claim her custody, Indraneel must prove to the court that he can take care of his daughter.

title: Anari
subTitle: Rama, a simpleton, is appointed as the bodyguard of Rajnandini, a rich girl. She soon falls in love with him but her brothers' violent nature gets in the way of her uniting with Rama.

title: Aankhen
subTitle: Good-for-nothing brothers Munnu and Bunnu crack elaborate practical jokes, one of which gets out of hand. As a result, Bunnu goes missing and is presumed dead while Munnu is suspected of his murder.

title: Taqdeerwala
subTitle: Yamraj and Chitragupta descend to Earth to look for the missing book of destiny. Soon, they find it in the possession of a man who refuses to part with it because it contains information of his mother's lifespan.

title: Sadak
subTitle: A young man who falls in love with a sex worker must overcome the social stigma as well as face the brothel owner and some criminal elements.

title: Waqt Ki Awaz
subTitle: A rich girl runs away from home and settles down with a truck driver. However, her dream life is shattered when she learns that her new lover has been accused of murder.

title: Akayla
subTitle: Inspector Vijay Verma captures the criminal mastermind Jojo. However, Jojo escapes from jail and kills Vijay's friends as revenge.

title: Akayla
subTitle: Inspector Vijay Verma captures the criminal mastermind Jojo. However, Jojo escapes from jail and kills Vijay's friends as revenge.

title: Muqaddar
subTitle: Shiva and Parshuram, two criminals, are arch-rivals and their enmity worsens when Shiva marries Parshuram's daughter. Later, their rivalry causes turmoil in the city.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Kasam Suhaag Ki
subTitle: Troubles arise for Surajmukhi after her husband, Sultan, is gunned down and she and her daughter get abducted by goons. She tries her best to get revenge and escape with her child.

title: Satyameva Jayate 2
subTitle: In a fight against corruption, several people take a mighty stand to put an end to their country's social evils and establish a law-abiding society.

title: Eeshwar
subTitle: Eeswar is a motherless child who hates his father for remarrying after his mother's death. He falls for a local politician's daughter which lands him in trouble.

title: Aag
subTitle: A young man seeks a fresh start in a village after enduring tragedy, only to find himself entangled in a conflict that tests his strength and sense of justice.

title: Junoon
subTitle: Vikram is badly injured and his friend is killed by a cursed tiger. He soon learns that the curse has been passed onto him and he will turn into a tiger on a full moon night.

title: Kshatriya
subTitle: Two royal families in Rajasthan fight annually to fulfil an age-old tradition. Unaware of the clash, their grandsons become best friends and attempt to end the family feud.

title: Virasat
subTitle: Shakti visits home and hopes to return soon. But when his village is torn in a feudal war due to his warring cousins, he is forced to take up his father's legacy, even at the cost of his own dreams.

title: Aaghaaz
subTitle: Govind, a young man, relocates to the city with his sister, Ratna, after a tragic experience. However, he interferes with the local mafia's plans and lands in trouble with them.
